summary: The diff implements both REQ-70 and REQ-71 largely as specified. Settings.tsx is overhauled with per-control skeleton loading states, API key load/save with 'Chave salva com sucesso!' toast, timeframe/sensitivity/notifications/daily-limit handlers wired to backend mutations, and theme toggle via ThemeContext. useQueries.ts adds all required hooks (useGetSettings, useUpdateSettings, useGetGeminiApiKey, useSetGeminiApiKey, useGetDailyOperationProgress, useSetDailyOperationLimit). useSettings.ts is updated to expose settings data cleanly. backend/main.mo is modified to include UserSettings, geminiApiKey, and related functions. All requirements appear addressed with no obvious missing functionality and no clearly hallucinated features.
